description_long: This is a small, single-story roadside diner with a weathered, retro appearance, featuring a flat roof and a faded white exterior. The front facade has two large red awnings above the windows, a central double door, and a prominent yellow and red DINER sign mounted on the roof. The property includes a parking lot with marked spaces, two vintage red gas pumps, several cacti, and a freestanding DINER MOTEL sign near the entrance. The side walls display old-fashioned painted advertisements and a mural, while the rear has a green dumpster and utility area. The overall look is reminiscent of mid-20th-century American diners found along highways in desert regions.
description: A weathered, retro-style roadside diner with a flat roof, red awnings, vintage gas pumps, and desert-themed decor including cacti and a freestanding sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double doors, two red awnings, the DINER sign on the roof, parking spaces, and the freestanding DINER MOTEL sign.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two vintage red gas pumps, a large cactus, and painted advertisements on the building's wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, a mural, a green dumpster, and additional cacti, with less emphasis on the entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back utility area, green dumpster, parking lot, and a stop sign, with minimal signage visible.
attribute_signage: There is a large, yellow and red DINER sign mounted on the roof, a freestanding DINER MOTEL sign at the parking lot entrance, and painted wall advertisements. The DINER sign is bold and retro, while the freestanding sign is white with block letters and an arrow, both highly visible.
attribute_logo: None. No recognizable brand or franchise logo is visible; signage is generic.
attribute_drive-thru_window: None. No drive-thru window or associated features are visible.
attribute_outdoor_seating: None. There are no visible tables, chairs, or outdoor seating areas.
attribute_architectural_style: Retro roadside diner style, characterized by a flat roof, simple rectangular form, large painted signage, vintage gas pumps, and desert-themed landscaping. The weathered exterior, bold colors, and mural evoke mid-20th-century American highway architecture.
